title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that lets anyone build software through conversation without requiring an engineering team. Two months after launch, millions of users were on the platform. The service is built in partnership with Anthropic and leverages Claude for its conversational capabilities.
